requirement_topic.en: EMC, Radio Modules and OCPP Interoperability

summary.en: Networked New Zealand EV chargers should be assessed for electromagnetic compatibility using the AS/NZS / IEC EMC framework applicable to EV conductive charging equipment, including IEC 61851-21-2 and IEC 61000 series evidence for the final hardware. Chargers with Wi-Fi, cellular, Bluetooth, RFID, payment terminals, or smart-metering modules also need radio and communications compliance evidence for the New Zealand supply route. OCPP is commonly required by charge-point operators for monitoring, billing, diagnostics, and smart charging, even where it is a project requirement rather than a standalone statute.
summary.zh: 联网新西兰电动汽车充电桩应按适用于电动汽车传导充电设备的AS/NZS / IEC EMC框架评估，包括最终硬件的IEC 61851-21-2及IEC 61000系列证据。带Wi-Fi、蜂窝、蓝牙、RFID、支付终端或智能计量模块的充电桩，还需针对新西兰供应路径准备无线电和通信合规证据。OCPP通常由充电运营商用于监控、计费、诊断和智能充电，即使其属于项目要求而非单独法规。
summary.zht: 聯網紐西蘭電動汽車充電樁應按適用於電動汽車傳導充電設備的AS/NZS / IEC EMC框架評估，包括最終硬體的IEC 61851-21-2及IEC 61000系列證據。帶Wi-Fi、蜂窩、藍牙、RFID、支付終端或智能計量模組的充電樁，還需針對紐西蘭供應路徑準備無線電和通訊合規證據。OCPP通常由充電運營商用於監控、計費、診斷和智能充電，即使其屬於項目要求而非單獨法規。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-21-2 — EMC requirements for off-board electric vehicle charging systems
AS/NZS-adopted EMC and radio compliance evidence for New Zealand supply
OCPP — project or charge-point-operator interoperability requirement

summary.en: China-market chargers may hold EMC reports to GB/T 18487.1 and GB/T / GB 17799 series standards, and DC chargers commonly implement GB/T 27930 vehicle-to-charger communication. GB/T 27930 is not an OCPP back-office protocol and does not establish interoperability with New Zealand charge-point management platforms.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩可能持有按GB/T 18487.1及GB/T / GB 17799系列标准出具的EMC报告，直流充电桩通常实现GB/T 27930车桩通信。GB/T 27930不是OCPP后台协议，也不能证明可与新西兰充电点管理平台互操作。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁可能持有按GB/T 18487.1及GB/T / GB 17799系列標準出具的EMC報告，直流充電樁通常實現GB/T 27930車樁通訊。GB/T 27930不是OCPP後台協議，也不能證明可與紐西蘭充電點管理平台互操作。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — includes EV conductive charging system EMC provisions
GB/T 27930 — DC charger and battery management system communication

gap.en: EMC and interoperability gap: test reports should cover the final New Zealand product with IEC 62196 connectors, actual cable lengths, filters, radio modules, payment modules, enclosure, and 230/400 V 50 Hz configuration. A China cloud protocol or GB/T 27930-only DC charger is not ready for an OCPP-managed New Zealand charging network without firmware, cybersecurity, SIM/network, and back-office acceptance testing.
gap.zh: EMC及互操作差距：测试报告应覆盖最终新西兰产品，包括IEC 62196接口、实际电缆长度、滤波器、无线模块、支付模块、外壳及230/400 V、50 Hz配置。仅支持中国云协议或GB/T 27930直流通信的充电桩，如未进行固件、网络安全、SIM/网络及后台验收测试，不适合接入OCPP管理的新西兰充电网络。
gap.zht: EMC及互操作差距：測試報告應覆蓋最終紐西蘭產品，包括IEC 62196接口、實際電纜長度、濾波器、無線模組、支付模組、外殼及230/400 V、50 Hz配置。僅支持中國雲協議或GB/T 27930直流通訊的充電樁，如未進行固件、網絡安全、SIM/網絡及後台驗收測試，不適合接入OCPP管理的紐西蘭充電網絡。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory or project-specific — EMC and radio compliance evidence is required where applicable; OCPP is typically required by network operators, tenders, or charging platform owners
mandatory_status.cn: China EMC and GB/T 27930 evidence applies domestically but does not satisfy New Zealand EMC/radio evidence or OCPP platform acceptance by itself

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For New Zealand networked chargers, EMC, radio-module, and OCPP evidence must be prepared for the final Type 2 / CCS2 hardware and firmware. China GB EMC reports, China cloud integrations, and GB/T 27930 DC communication are not enough for a New Zealand operator acceptance package.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对于新西兰联网充电桩，EMC、无线模块及OCPP证据须针对最终Type 2 / CCS2硬件和固件准备。中国GB EMC报告、中国云集成及GB/T 27930直流通信不足以构成新西兰运营商验收文件包。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對於紐西蘭聯網充電樁，EMC、無線模組及OCPP證據須針對最終Type 2 / CCS2硬體和固件準備。中國GB EMC報告、中國雲集成及GB/T 27930直流通訊不足以構成紐西蘭運營商驗收文件包。
